expectations.text: CLAUDE.md contains a new directive about consistency passes after renames
expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md contains '## Consistency Pass After Renames' with directive text about checking all references

expectations.text: FEEDBACK_FOO.md FOO_1 is moved to Resolved section
expectations.evidence: FOO_1 appears under '## Resolved' with resolution note

expectations.text: FEEDBACK_FOO.md FOO_1 resolution notes what changed and where
expectations.evidence: Resolution says: 'Promoted to CLAUDE.md directive: Consistency Pass After Renames'

expectations.text: Cross-reference between CLAUDE.md directive and FOO_1
expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md directive does NOT have a '<!-- managed by /foo -->' breadcrumb or any reference to FOO_1. The cross-reference is one-directional only (FEEDBACK_FOO.md points to CLAUDE.md, but not vice versa)
